name: The Bunker at Waters Edge
about: The Bunker at Waters Edge is a golf simulator venue powered by Toptracer Range technology. It offers a space for golf practice, leagues, and events, with on-site food and beverage options. The facility features bay reservations, lessons, and a dedicated app for booking. The kitchen closes half an hour before the bays, and the venue has extended fall and winter hours for 2025.
why_golfers_like_it: Powered by Toptracer Range technology for advanced ball tracking
On-site food and beverage options available
Offers leagues and events for community engagement
Dedicated app for easy bay reservations
Available for private events and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food menu available; kitchen closes 1/2 hour before bays
Full bar available at The Bunker and Lakes Restaurant & Pub

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Clubs are not explicitly mentioned as being provided, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drinks may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior golf programs and is considered kid-friendly.
